nasb.text: The Lord said to Moses and Aaron, “This is the ordinance of the Passover: no foreigner is to eat of it;

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses and Aaron, “This is the statute of the Passover: no foreigner shall eat of it,

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：“逾越節的定例是這樣，凡是外族人都不可以吃羊羔的肉。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西和亚伦说：“以下是逾越节的条例。 “所有外族人都不可吃逾越节的羊羔，
